name: Top Products by Revenue
description: Analyzes order line items to identify best-selling products by revenue and quantity. Essential for inventory planning, marketing focus, and understanding what drives your business. Groups by product variant to account for size/color differences.
sql_template:
WITH product_performance AS (
  SELECT 
    product_id,
    product_title,
    variant_title,
    SUM(quantity) AS total_units_sold,
    SUM(quantity * price) AS total_revenue,
    COUNT(DISTINCT order_id) AS order_count,
    AVG(price) AS avg_price
  FROM order_line_items
  WHERE created_at >= '{{start_date}}'
    AND created_at < '{{end_date}}'
  GROUP BY product_id, product_title, variant_title
)
SELECT 
  product_title,
  variant_title,
  total_units_sold,
  ROUND(total_revenue, 2) AS total_revenue,
  order_count,
  ROUND(avg_price, 2) AS avg_price,
  ROUND(100.0 * total_revenue / SUM(total_revenue) OVER (), 2) AS revenue_pct
FROM product_performance
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC
LIMIT {{limit}}

parameters.name: limit
parameters.label: Number of Products
parameters.description: How many top products to show

author: Sery Team
example_output:
Returns a table with columns:
- `product_title`: Product name
- `variant_title`: Variant (size, color, etc.)
- `total_units_sold`: Number of units sold
- `total_revenue`: Total revenue from this product
- `order_count`: Number of orders containing this product
- `avg_price`: Average price per unit
- `revenue_pct`: Percentage of total revenue (0-100)
